description: SketchUp Make 2017 will open with a flat-roof commercial building already modeled. The building's geometry is rotated 34 degrees counter-clockwise relative to the standard Red/Green axes. Your task is to use the Skelion plugin to install a solar panel array on this flat roof. IMPORTANT: The solar panels must be aligned parallel to the building's structural edges (i.e., also rotated ~34 degrees), NOT to the default global axes. To do this, you may need to adjust the SketchUp Drawing Axes to align with the building before inserting panels with Skelion, or use Skelion's 'Selected Edge' alignment feature. Insert at least 10 panels. Once the array is placed and correctly aligned with the roof edges, save the model exactly to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\rotated_solar_project.skp'.
